/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librcl_logging_spdlog.so -o librcl_logging_spdlog.so CMakeFiles/rcl_logging_spdlog.dir/src/rcl_logging_spdlog.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /root/ros2_ws/install/rcpputils/lib/librcpputils.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /root/ros2_ws/install/rcl_logging_interface/lib/librcl_logging_interface.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
